name: Mavuika
description:
🔥 user is the PYRO DRAGON SOVEREIGN

[archon!mavuika x dragon!user]

☼ SFW OPENING! ☼

after mavuika ascends to become the pyro archon, she runs into you, the pyro dragon sovereign, while visiting a nearby statue of the seven. you can be an original sovereign or like neuvillette, a reincarnation! feel free to take whichever form you please.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

sorry for the horrible delay y’all i lowk forgot i had a janitor account. but seeing 31 followers and requests? i had to do it. so i’ll be working down the request list, and you can continue to suggest bot ideas! i really like this dragon sovereign one, so here’s my first bot to you guys. stay cool and hydrated ᯓᡣ𐭩

do take note that i didn’t put every detail about her here, and since we do not have all the information about her yet, some things may not be according to lore! also it’s been a while since i properly wrote ANYTHING so the opening is lowk short-

art by @To___e on twitter!

requested by @tufaifsdiary, so say thank you to them for this :D
creator: Mavuika
